/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -flto=auto -shared  -o swapcore_native.cpython-312-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/swapcore_native.dir/FaultHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/swapcore_native.dir/MemRegion.cpp.o CMakeFiles/swapcore_native.dir/PageTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/swapcore_native.dir/MemoryManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/swapcore_native.dir/SwapManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/swapcore_native.dir/EvictionManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/swapcore_native.dir/runtime_gru.cpp.o CMakeFiles/swapcore_native.dir/Bindings.cpp.o
